prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated D16A9 (1.6L SOHC 16V, 135 PS stock) with a custom-built Toda Racing D16A high-compression forged piston kit (12.5:1 CR), Toda billet crankshaft, and Eagle H-beam connecting rods for 9,000 RPM reliability. Paired with a Toda Racing Stage 3 head with oversized 33mm intake/29mm exhaust valves, port-matched to a Skunk2 Pro Series intake manifold and 64mm throttle body for optimized airflow.

Forced induction via a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by Hytech Exhaust, feeding into a 3-inch downpipe and a custom 2.5-inch straight-pipe exhaust system with a Burns Stainless muffler. Boost controlled via a HKS EVC-S electronic boost controller and monitored with a Defi Advance BF turbo pressure gauge (0-2 bar).

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs) paired with Cusco front and rear sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear), Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings (full set), and a Whiteline front strut tower bar. Braking upgraded to Endless CC-50 brake pads with DBA 4000 Series slotted rotors and stainless steel braided lines, stopping power further enhanced by a Nissin 4-pot caliper conversion kit for the front.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny EF8 widebody kit (Version 2) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper lip, and rear diffuser, all finished in a matte Gunmetal Gray wrap with gloss black accents. Rear wing replaced with a custom 3-piece Voltex Type-3 GT wing (1,700mm span) mounted on carbon fiber pedestals.

OEM+ interior with a Bride Zeta III low-back seat (driver side) and a Recaro SRD-E fixed-back seat (passenger side), both mounted on custom Bride seat rails. Steering wheel replaced with a Nardi Classic 350mm suede wheel on a NRG quick-release hub, paired with a custom MOMO shift knob (short shifter) and a Cusco 6-point bolt-in roll cage (half-cage, bolt-in design).

Lighting upgraded to custom Hella 500 Series headlights (projector lenses with LED halos) and Depo Racing JDM-style taillights (clear lens, red LED). Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P (15x8 +15 front, 15x9 +20 rear) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (195/50/15 front, 225/45/15 rear).
